name: Carob Chip Banana Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Rumford Aluminum Free Baking Powder
1/2 cup Chatfield's Dairy Free Carob Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the wet ingredients: mashed ripe bananas, water, and canola oil.
3. Pour the wet mixture into the bowl with the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
4. Grease two 7 x 4 x 2 inch loaf pans with butter or cooking spray.
5. Divide the batter evenly between the prepared pans.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the bread comes out clean.
